# VSCode Configuration for Courier Project

This folder contains settings and configurations for developing the Courier project in VSCode.

## Files

- `settings.json`: Configures Rust Analyzer and disables snake_case warnings.
- `extensions.json`: Recommends the Rust Analyzer extension.
- `launch.json`: Sets up debugging for the Courier project.
- `tasks.json`: Defines build and run tasks for the project.
- `.gitignore`: Ignores VSCode settings files.

## Setup

Ensure you have the Rust Analyzer extension installed for optimal development experience.
